title: FIRST STROKE
overview: An up-and-coming anime director, Natsuko Hirose, is busy trying to storyboard a rom-com themed feature film, but because she's never experienced first love, she can't seem to progress with her storyboards.

title: DEFEND
overview: The prophet of the Last Town, Elder Baobab, decides that Natsuko should join the Nine Soldiers, but her and Luke are at odds. Natsuko tries to figure out a way back home, but then remembers what happens next in "A Tale of Perishing" and realizes everyone's in danger again.

title: DESTINY
overview: The Last Town has their Harvest Festival and the Nine Soldiers get some time off. That's where Luke meets Destiny. In "A Tale of Perishing," the two fall in love, but Natsuko coming into the this world seems to be throwing off that destiny...

title: ETERNITY
overview: Natsuko notices that Memmeln is acting strange. In the movie, there is a scene with Memmeln that's a mystery even to fans, so Natsuko tails her...

title: JUSTICE
overview: Destiny asks the Nine Soldiers to bring food to some orphans and they run into a former Nine Soldier, Justice.

title: CHANGE
overview: Natsuko loses to the Voids for the first time, but still tries to continue her selfish actions.

title: FIRST LOVE
overview: Natsuko tries to figure out exactly what first love feels like for her upcoming film.

title: CONFESSION
overview: Luke finally tells Natsuko how he really feels about her.

title: HERO
overview: Luke thinks about his life as the legendary hero.

title: CHAOS
overview: Rumors start to spread about Natsuko which leads the people of the Last Town to turn on her.

title: DESPAIR
overview: Luke suffers more loss and falls into despair while Memmeln comes up with a certain plan with Meg and Sally.

title: ZENSHU
overview: Natsuko has to draw one final thing to save the Last Town from its greatest threat.
